ogTitle: Bearii vs Bears Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bearii and Bears Lagoon.
heading: Bearii vs Bears Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bearii, Victoria and Bears Lagoon, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bears Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bearii (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bearii or Bears Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bearii has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Bears Lagoon scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bearii scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Bears Lagoon scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bearii or Bears Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bears Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
